question_intent: Find the name of the member who made the highest charge in the Lodging category and whose corporation is in the North American region

plan.question_intent: Find the name of the member who made the highest charge in the Lodging category and whose corporation is in the North American region
plan.detail_query: SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_amt, cat.category_desc, r.region_name FROM charge AS c JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no JOIN corporation AS corp ON m.corp_no = corp.corp_no JOIN region AS r ON corp.region_no = r.region_no WHERE cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' AND r.region_name = 'North American' ORDER BY c.charge_amt DESC LIMIT 1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_amt, cat.category_desc, r.region_name
join_clauses: JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
JOIN corporation AS corp ON m.corp_no = corp.corp_no
JOIN region AS r ON corp.region_no = r.region_no
blocks.notes: This block returns the member's first name, last name, charge amount, category description, and region name for all Lodging charges made by members whose corporation is in the North American region

blocks.name: root
blocks.from_clause: FROM (SELECT firstname, lastname, charge_amt FROM {{leaf_1}} ORDER BY charge_amt DESC LIMIT 1) AS highest_charge
blocks.notes: This block returns the full name of the member who made the highest charge in the Lodging category and whose corporation is in the North American region

LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
JOIN corporation AS corp ON m.corp_no = corp.corp_no
JOIN region AS r ON corp.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging')
LIMIT 5

FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no

JOIN region AS r ON corp.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging') AND (r.region_name = 'North American')
LIMIT 5

steps.sql:
SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_amt, cat.category_desc, r.region_name
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
JOIN corporation AS corp ON m.corp_no = corp.corp_no
JOIN region AS r ON corp.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging')

build_logs.notes: This block returns the full name of the member who made the highest charge in the Lodging category and whose corporation is in the North American region

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT firstname, lastname, charge_amt FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_amt, cat.category_desc, r.region_name
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
JOIN corporation AS corp ON m.corp_no = corp.corp_no
JOIN region AS r ON corp.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging')) ORDER BY charge_amt DESC LIMIT 1) AS highest_charge
LIMIT 5

SELECT firstname || ' ' || lastname AS member_name
FROM (SELECT firstname, lastname, charge_amt FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_amt, cat.category_desc, r.region_name
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
JOIN corporation AS corp ON m.corp_no = corp.corp_no
JOIN region AS r ON corp.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging')) ORDER BY charge_amt DESC LIMIT 1) AS highest_charge

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.charge_amt) AS total_charge_amount
FROM ((SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, c.charge_dt, m.member_no, m.lastname, m.firstname, r.region_name AS member_region, corr.region_no AS corp_region_no
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN corporation AS corr ON m.corp_no = corr.corp_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc IN ('Travel', 'Meals', 'Lodging')) AND (corr.region_no IN (2, 3, 4)))) AS leaf_1

question: Who is the member with the highest charge amount in the 'Lodging' category?
